Name: Creative Labs Pte Ltd
Description:
Creative is the worldwide leader in digital entertainment products for the personal computer (PC) and the Internet. Creative was founded in Singapore in 1981 with the vision that multimedia would revolutionize the way people interact with their PCs.

Famous for its Sound Blaster sound cards and for launching the multimedia revolution, Creative is now driving digital entertainment on the PC platform with products like its highly acclaimed ZEN line of digital audio players. The company's innovative hardware, proprietary technology, applications and services enable consumers to experience high-quality digital entertainment-anytime, anywhere.

Since launching the phenomenally successful Sound Blaster sound cards and setting the de facto standard for PC audio in 1989, Creative has been able to leverage on its leading-edge audio technology, huge user base and strong brand name to expand into the exciting lifestyle Personal Digital Entertainment (PDE) market.

Today, Creative is widely recognized as a global leader for product innovation in the audio and PDE segments, offering consumers a complete, high quality digital entertainment experience through Creative's hardware, software applications and services. Finding the perfect balance between form and function, Creative strives for every product to be a sensory feast for the eyes and ears.

With 1,800 employees and with 4.1 billion euros in sales in 2024, the Group companies operate through three main brands: Esprinet, V-Valley, and Zeliatech. Since 2025, it has also been present in Benelux and Ireland, as well as in Italy, Spain, Portugal, and Morocco.

The holding (PRT:IM - ISIN IT0003850929) is listed on the Italian Stock Exchange in the Euronext STAR Milan segment and participates in UN Global Compact, adhering to its approach based on the principles of responsible business.

Name: Focelda SpA
Description:
Focelda S.p.A inizia l’attività nel 1983. Le “Forniture per Centri Elaborazione Dati” (da cui l'acronimo), è stata la prima attività dell’azienda, dai prodotti di consumo alla produzione di stampati aziendali, la Focelda diviene in pochi anni leader indiscusso e partner di molte aziende di primaria importanza in Campania e nel centro -sud Italia. 
Intuendo l'evoluzione del mondo dell'ICT, sia in termini di fabbisogni che di tecnologie, a partire dalla fine degli anni Ottanta, Focelda ha curato il costante ampliamento della gamma dei prodotti in distribuzione, con la mission di divenire il più fornito punto di riferimento per tutti gli operatori e le aziende informatiche presenti sul territorio.
Oggi, i centri sono presenti a Napoli, Bari, Roma e Firenze, riservati esclusivamente agli operatori del settore, ed impegnano complessivamente 4,000 mq. I cash&carry Focelda sono ubicati in zone commerciali ed allocati in strutture funzionali e moderne, dove l'importanza strategica delle operazioni di scarico, carico e parcheggio è stata tenuta in altissima considerazione.
L’importazione diretta dai paesi asiatici, il rapporto diretto con i Vendors, il vasto assortimento di circa 4.000 prodotti tutti in pronta consegna, l'assicurazione del credito, la produzione diretta di PC col marchio ADJ, le consegne immediate con mezzi e con corrieri qualificati a tariffe vantaggiose, la dilazione nei pagamenti, rendono Focelda, oggi, un'azienda tra le più competitive e fornite d'Italia.

Name: Oksid Bilisim
Description:
As a wholesaler of technology products, our company was established in 1999. Since 2003, we have started to create a dealer network across Turkey and have continued to expand this network every year, maintaining our rise in the industry. Adapting to the changing and evolving technology, our company has kept its product range constantly up-to-date and broad. In 2008, we initiated import operations; during this process, by manufacturing under our own brands as well as importing international brands, we began to offer our customers even more advantages. Our Vision

To support our business partners and customers on their digital transformation journey, to connect them with the most suitable technologies for their business models, and to be the leading technology provider in Turkey.

Our Mission

We support the success stories of our business partners and customers by enhancing their efficiency with innovative products, simple supply chain solutions extending from global to national sources, and our straightforward and agile operational infrastructure.

Name: OTH Produtos
Description:
Com 30 anos de experiência no mercado de tecnologia, a OTH Produtos é referência brasileira na compra, venda e troca de equipamentos de informática seminovos, oferecendo soluções acessíveis, sustentáveis e de alta qualidade.

Nossa missão é transformar o consumo de tecnologia em algo mais inteligente, econômico e consciente. Acreditamos na economia circular como motor de transformação e trabalhamos para reduzir o lixo eletrônico, prolongando a vida útil de dispositivos por meio da reutilização responsável.

Atendemos pessoas físicas, empresas e instituições que buscam economia de até 50% sem abrir mão da qualidade. Todos os nossos produtos são rigorosamente testados, possuem garantia e contam com suporte técnico especializado para esclarecer dúvidas e garantir a melhor escolha, sempre de acordo com a sua necessidade.

Mais do que vender tecnologia, queremos inspirar uma nova forma de consumo. Repensar como compramos, usamos e valorizamos nossos equipamentos, esse é o primeiro passo para construir um futuro promissor para as próximas gerações e o meio ambiente.

Na OTH, somos apaixonados pelo que fazemos. Valorizamos a inovação, o atendimento próximo e a excelência em cada etapa. Junte-se a nós e descubra como a tecnologia pode ser utilizada de maneira benéfica e eficiente.


Desde 1997, nosso compromisso é oferecer soluções eficientes e sustentáveis para empresas e consumidores que buscam equipamentos de qualidade com preços competitivos. Acreditamos que cada produto tem valor e pode ganhar novas possibilidades nas mãos certas. 

Na OTH Produtos, você encontra não apenas equipamentos, mas também um atendimento personalizado e consultoria especializada para garantir a melhor escolha. Nossa expertise de décadas no setor nos permite oferecer a você um negócio justo, transparente e seguro.

Name: ACADIA INFORMATIQUE
Description:

De simple revendeur, ACADIA se place aujourd’hui comme acteur majeur dans la distribution sélective.

Grossiste généraliste en informatique, son activité se tourne vers les professionnels, les revendeurs, les entreprises, les associations et les administrations. Sa force commerciale lui a permis de se déployer dans son secteur et de se placer n°1 dans le gaming et leader sur le marché de l’intégration. 
L’enthousiasme et la détermination de ses collaborateurs lui permettent aujourd’hui de travailler avec les plus grands. MSI, ASUS, ACER, IIYAMA, GIGABYTE, AMD, INTEL, LENOVO, VIEWSONIC, CORSAIR, COOLER MASTER, SEAGATE, WD,  … et tant d’autres, suivent ACADIA quotidiennement dans le cadre de formations, de deals, d’échanges et surtout de bons moments.

2022 marquera les 25 ans d’ACADIA. Un nouveau site internet, de nouveaux partenaires, nouvelles idées ; l’aventure n’est pas prête de se terminer !

Name: 3giga Komputery i Serwis
Description:
Firma 3Giga powstała w kwietniu 2006 roku jako jednoosobowa działalność. Na bazie kilkuletniego doświadczenia i wiedzy zdobytej w różnych serwisach i firmach stworzyliśmy serwis sprzętu komputerowego, do jakiego sami chcielibyśmy trafić. Różnorodność zainteresowań pozwoliło nam na proponowanie tak szerokich usług naszym klientom. Dzięki świetnie dobranej kadrze możemy proponować usługi na wysokim poziomie. Zaangażowanie pracowników i ich chęć rozwoju zapewnia klientom profesjonalną obsługę i pomoc w tej skomplikowanej dziedzinie serwisowej. 

Promujemy hasło ” Nie wyrzucaj Napraw”

W 2018 rozbudowaliśmy naszą ofertę o sprzęt komputerowy polesingowy: komputery, laptopy, monitory, drukarki. Wieloletnie doświadczenie serwisowe pozwala nam na wybór sprzętu w bardzo dobry stanie technicznym. Dokładamy wszystkich starań aby sprzęt poleasingowy był w klasie A – czyli znikome ślady zużycia.

Promujemy hasło „Zamiast nowy wybierz poleasingowy”

NIE WIEMY CZY WIESZ , ŻE WYBIERAJĄC SPRZĘT KOMPUTEROWY POLEASINGOWY CHRONISZ ŚRODOWISKO.
Okazuje się, że do wyprodukowania nowego komputera potrzebne jest zużycie 1,8 tony surowców naturalny? Dlatego sprzęt poleasingowy z rynku wtórnego to dobry wybór. Z doświadczenia wiemy, że sprzęt komputerowy poleasingowy BIZNESOWY spełnia wymagania, płynnej i bezawaryjnej pracy  większości użytkowników. Tym samym dbasz o swój budżet i o środowisko. Gratulujemy decyzji.   Laptopy poleasingowe – skąd się biorą ?

Laptopy poleasingowe są jednostkami, które były używane w korporacjach. Po okresie leasingowania wracają na rynek wtórny. Jest to sprzęty klasy biznesowej.  Przed wysyłką, każdy laptop jest czyszczony i przechodzi dokładne testy. Dzięki temu, jesteśmy pewni ich jakości i możemy udzielić 12 miesięcznej gwarancji, z możliwością jej rozszerzenia. Zdjęcia przedstawiają przykładowy sprzedawany egzemplarz.

Name: Fibercon UK
Description:
Fibercon Distribution UK, a seasoned player in the field, is a leading provider of fibre optic patch cords. We offer both standard and customised solutions, tailored to meet the specific demands of our clients. Our products, integral to the telecommunications and data transmission industries, deliver high-performance connections that power today's digital world. With over a decade of experience, we have honed our skills in providing rapid, reliable, and scalable solutions, addressing the unique challenges faced by businesses across the UK and Europe.

At the core of Fibercon's operations lies an unwavering commitment to quality. We manufacture a variety of patch cords, including SC, LC, ST, FC, and LSH connector families, fan-out assemblies, and FTTH solutions. All our products are crafted at our facility in Romania, where we employ a highly automated production process. This ensures precision and reliability, even at high volumes, while meeting international standards such as ISO 9001:2015, a testament to our dedication to quality.

Our supply chain is optimised to deliver fast, transparent service. We ship from Romania directly to the UK within weeks, often avoiding the delays that have affected global logistics. Additionally, we maintain a UK-based warehouse, enabling us to meet urgent orders and mitigate any potential disruptions in international supply.

By offering customised patch cord solutions, Fibercon Distribution UK ensures your specific needs are met with tailored products that guarantee seamless integration into your systems. Whether it's custom cable lengths, connector types, or specialised materials, we work closely with our clients to deliver on time every time.

Our dedication to efficiency, competitive pricing, and client satisfaction has positioned us as a trusted partner for some of the biggest names in telecommunications. We are proud to contribute to the uninterrupted expansion of networks across Europe.

Description:
En el dinámico paisaje del comercio contemporáneo, la tecnología se ha convertido en el motor principal del progreso y la innovación. En este contexto, nuestra empresa emerge como un protagonista destacado en el mundo de la venta mayorista de productos tecnológicos. Con una trayectoria consolidada y un enfoque centrado en la excelencia y la satisfacción del cliente, nos hemos convertido en un referente confiable y líder en el sector. Esta empresa es el resultado de una visión audaz y de un compromiso inquebrantable con la calidad, la eficiencia y la adaptación a las demandas del mercado global.

Historia

Nuestra empresa nació de la pasión por la tecnología y la visión de un equipo de emprendedores visionarios. Fundada hace más de una década, comenzamos como una modesta startup con una visión clara: democratizar el acceso a la tecnología mediante la oferta de productos de calidad a precios competitivos. Desde entonces, hemos experimentado un crecimiento constante y sostenido, expandiendo nuestro alcance y diversificando nuestro catálogo de productos para satisfacer las necesidades cambiantes de nuestros clientes.

Misión

Nuestra misión es simple pero ambiciosa: proporcionar a nuestros clientes acceso fácil y conveniente a una amplia gama de productos tecnológicos de alta calidad al mejor precio posible. Nos esforzamos por ofrecer un servicio excepcional, respaldado por un equipo comprometido y una infraestructura logística eficiente, garantizando una experiencia de compra sin igual para cada cliente.

Valores

En el corazón de nuestra empresa se encuentran nuestros valores fundamentales, que guían cada aspecto de nuestras operaciones:

Compromiso con la calidad: Nos comprometemos a ofrecer productos tecnológicos que cumplan con los más altos estándares de calidad y rendimiento, garantizando la satisfacción y confianza de nuestros clientes.

Innovación: Abrazamos la innovación como motor de progreso y mejora continua. Estamos constantemente explorando nuevas tecnolo

Name: Phonetrading365 Limited
Description:
Phonetrading365 Limited , a thriving B2B wholesaler specializing in mobile devices and consumer electronics, operating within the EU market.
We focus on big transactions and the ability and speed of our Sales team in purchasing and reselling large quantities of electronic material makes us competitive.

Registered in December 2020 and commencing operations in 2021, PHT365 operates under a VAT exemption regime, ensuring seamless transactions where goods are delivered directly to buyers without passing through Malta. Our core competency lies in identifying and sourcing stocks of consumer electronics from major market operators and connecting them with buyers across different regions. Our exclusive focus remains on serving large-scale entities across EU member countries, tailored to their unique needs and requirements.

During its years of activity, PHT365 has swiftly cultivated strong connections with key industry players, wholesalers, and specialized logistics firms. Furthermore, we’re VIP Gold members of Handelot Platform from 2022. This network has been pivotal in driving our rapid growth and success. Looking ahead, we are enthusiastic about our expansion plans across various European locations in the coming years.
While we maintain a website (https://phonetrading365.com/) as our virtual showroom, it's important to note that our business model revolves around direct engagement with suppliers and customers through our established network.

Name: VTS Computing
Description:
Professional heavy industry engineer works on computer
Innovative and effective solutions
In many industries, an organisation’s efficiency, quality of output, and service provision rely heavily on its IT system. Inadequate, incompatible or inefficient software and hardware (individually or in combination) can cause poor performance.

At VTS, we believe in aiding organisations to reach their full potential by designing and building bespoke workstations that enable their business to flourish. 

Increasing efficiencies, maximising productivity, and utilising an organisation’s full capacity are at the core of what we do.

Not only do we deliver exceptional solutions to our clients, but we are committed to excellence at every stage.

Taking time to diagnose the core issues facing our clients – whether they be budget challenges, unusual software requirements or limited space – is the crucial first step in our process.

Using the information we gather from this consultation allows us to design and build the right IT system for your business, meeting your requirements and enhancing your capabilities.

Our custom-built computers for advanced 2D CAD, high-end 3D modelling, and photo rendering, and gaming are unmatched in the market, and our ongoing support services ensure that they remain that way. 

Utilising industry-leading hardware that is both compatible and optimised for your software needs, we ensure peak computational power and performance.

At VTS Computing, our skilled engineers and specialist computer designers are passionate about identifying, designing, and building the right workstation to support your business.

With years of practical experience in designing and installing custom computers for industry applications, our team provides the full lifecycle of service, from initial consultation and diagnostics, through to installation, testing, and ongoing support.

Description:
- We are specialised computer company from Slovenia EU called Mlacom d.o.o. 
- Company was establish in 1989 by Marko Mlakar and is now still run by his two sons and a super team of creative and hard working people to cover almost everything what IT can offer.

- But we do not like to call ourselves the oldest one. 
- We prefer to call ourselves as the most experienced and versatile computer company from Slovenia run by a family, friends and co-workers.

- Our core business are servers, high end work stations, custom builds, gaming computers, water cooled custom builds, crypto mining rigs, gaming peripherals,... 
- But it is not about that, it is all about listening to our customers, connect with them and hear their demands to bring them the most suitable solutions for their needs.

- Just a few references from our past years pc cluster in National Institute of Chemistry, water cooled disk aray custom build in a helicopter, crypto mining cluster with directed air exhaust from GPU-s into a fruit dryer hall, custom dual PC builds for a few known Slovenian streamers, etc

- Our business partners, customers, friends and fast paced market demands from us to always bring new high-end computer hardware from our vendors and distributors around the world as soon as we can.

- We hold distribution for SuperMicro, a leading provider of advanced Server Building Block Solutions, Ducky Channel the world leader in professional mechanical keyboards with Cherry MX switches and PBT material keycaps, Noctua premium cooling components, Fractal high end computer cases, DXRacer leading premium brand of gaming/office chairs, Asrock Rack, Silverstone, G.Skill, Adata,...

- We are also resellers and close partners with Elkotex, Avtera, Also, Asbis, PCplus, PChand

- We ship to Europe and outside of Europe and continents world wide if our customers demands it.

شرکت تکنوکلاینت از سال ۲۰۱۷ با هدف ارائه راهکارهای نوین در حوزه فناوری اطلاعات، فعالیت خود را در زمینه فروش سیستمهای سازمانی و ارائه مشاوره تخصصی در بهینهسازی منابع سختافزاری و زیرساختی محیطهای کاری، سازمانها و دفاتر آغاز کرد.

در گام نخست، این شرکت با عرضه سیستمهای کامپیوتری سازمانی از نوع Thin Client و Zero Client از برندهای معتبر جهانی مانند HP و Dell وارد بازار شد. با توسعه فعالیتها، تکنوکلاینت به حوزه مجازیسازی منابع ورود پیدا کرد و پروژههای موفقی را در زمینه پیادهسازی زیرساختهای مجازی مبتنی بر سرور، دسکتاپ و شبکه به انجام رساند.

در ادامه مسیر رشد، تکنوکلاینت خدمات فروش و راهاندازی سیستمهای VoIP را نیز به مجموعه توانمندیهای خود افزود. امروزه، این شرکت علاوه بر ارائه راهکارهای سختافزاری و نرمافزاری، در زمینههای تبلیغات دیجیتال، تولید محتوا و طراحی وبسایت نیز به طور فعال مشغول به فعالیت است.

ما در تکنوکلاینت بر این باوریم که ارتقای کیفیت زیرساختهای فناوری اطلاعات، لازمهی بهرهوری در سازمانها و محیطهای کاری است. به همین دلیل، چشمانداز ما پوشش جامع تمامی نیازهای فناورانهی کسبوکارها، اعم از دولتی و خصوصی، در حوزه فناوری اطلاعات و ارتباطات است.
بهبود مستمر، نوآوری و همگامسازی با فناوریهای روز، اصولی هستند که مسیر رشد ما را شکل میدهند.

Name: Cédrus Számítástechnikai Kft.
Description:
Cégünk Számítástechnikai és Biztonságtechnikai eszközök disztribúciós, illetve nagykereskedelmi forgalmazásával foglalkozik. Ezáltal partnereink kizárólag Viszonteladók, illetve Telepítők lehetnek.

A 2001 elején magyar magánszemélyek által alapított vállalkozás számos nemzetközileg ismert és elismert gyártó hazai márkaképviseletét látja el. Partnereink termékei a világ számos területén piacvezető pozíciót töltenek be kategóriájukban, és hasonló sikerek elérésére törekednek Magyarországon is. Az általunk forgalmazott termékek kiválasztásánál nagy figyelmet fordítunk a termék hazai versenyképességére és a megbízhatóság biztosítására. A színvonalasabb és teljesebb kiszolgálás érdekében folyamatosan fáradozunk termékkörünk bővítésén.

Célunk, hogy partnereinknek teljes körű szolgáltatást és portfoliót nyújtva, testre szabott kiszolgálással biztos pontot jelentsünk a hazai piacon. Kollégáink felkészültsége, gyártói kapcsolataink erőssége, és tőkeerős biztos hátterünk a garancia arra, hogy partnereink hosszú távon sikeresek lehessenek.
Az összeszokott és rugalmas szervezetünk képes arra, hogy kiváló szakértelemmel, gyors, pontos tájékoztatással, széles és friss árukészlettel, informatikai, pénzügyi és logisztikai szolgáltatásaival magas színvonalon elégítse ki ügyfelei igényét.
 
2015-ben megújult a cégünk WEB portálja, ahol a partnereink a nap 24 órájában kényelmesen tudnak termékeket rendelni és tájékozódni az árakról, készletekről, termékekről és a garanciális ügyekről.
 
Vállalatunk 2016-ban Budapest IV. kerületébe az M3 - M0-ás autópálya és a Megyeri híd közelébe a Megyeri útra költözött, ahol kiváló megközelíthetőség mellett új irodában, megnövelt raktárral, valamint nagy területű, őrzött és zárt parkolóval állunk ügyfeleink rendelkezésére.

Name: ŞAFAK BİLGİ TEKNOLOJİLERİ
Description: Şafak Bilgi Teknolojilerinin 55 yılı aşkın yolculuğu 1968 yılında Babamız M. ŞEFİK GÜVENLİ tarafından “GÜVENLİ BÜRO MAKİNELERİ” olarak kurulan firma; mekanik Daktilo, Hesap Makinesi ve Teksir Makineleri tamiri ile başlar. Mekanik sistemler teknolojinin gelişimi ile 1980’lerde yerini elektronik makinelere bırakır ve firmamızda ünvanını ŞAFAK MAKİNA olarak değiştirir. Doksanların ortalarında firmamız yolunu bambaşka bir sektöre; Güç Elektroniği Sistemlerine çevirir. 1999 yılında ŞAFAK MAKİNA ELEKTRONİK DONANIM SİS. LTD. ŞTİ. olarak ismini tescilleyip, 2000 yılında ise Xerox Büro Araçları ve İnform Elektronik ile bayilik anlaşmaları imzalayarak yatırımlarına devam eder. 2005 yılında ise unvanını faaliyet konusuna göre ŞAFAK BİLGİ TEKNOLOJİLERİ PAZARLAMA VE SERVİS LTD.xn--ti-eta21o. olarak güncellemiştir. Büro makineleri ile başladığı yolculuğunda bugün iki ana branşta (Güç Sistemleri ve Baskı Teknolojileri) uzmanlaşan firmamız: XEROX, İNFORM, EPSON, BROTHER, LEGRAND ve PİLLER gibi alanlarında dünya devi markaların Doğu Anadolu bölge bayiliklerini Erzurum merkez olmak üzere; İstanbul, Ankara, Malatya, Elazığ ve Van’da bağlı şubeleri ile yaklaşık 100 kişilik bir kadro ile sürdürmektedir.

Name: PREFURB
Description:
Prefurb is niet zomaar jouw IT-partner. Prefurb is een nieuwe manier van denken en van ondernemen. De premium refurbished hardware die wij leveren geven wij een tweede kans zonder prestatie vermindering.

Als ondernemer heb je wel meer te doen dan je zorgen maken over je apparatuur. Onze dienstverlening is zo ingericht, dat jij je bezig kan houden met wat echt belangrijk is. We bieden flexibele abonnementen die meegroeien met je bedrijf. Toe aan verandering? Dan veranderen we mee, zelfs als je tijdelijk niet al je werkplekken nodig hebt. En de initiële kosten zijn laag, waardoor jij kunt doen waar je goed in bent.

Niet de computer als basis, maar zorgeloos werkgemak. We houden niet van verrassingen. Met de full service digitale werkplekken van Prefurb weet je precies wat je maandelijks betaalt. Over het onderhoud van je apparatuur, service en de beveiliging van de gegevens hoef je bovendien niet na te denken. Wij kunnen alles uit handen nemen.

Garantie tot aan de deur? Niet bij ons. Zolang het contract loopt bieden wij de beste service mogelijk. Bijvoorbeeld als je reparatie nodig hebt. Onze professionele helpdesk doet dat binnen 1 werkdag! Bij Prefurb werken we met trots aan het ontzorgen van anderen. Werkgeluk noemen we dat.

Continuïteit en snelle service met producten van de beste kwaliteit en voor een lage prijs. Goed voor de zaak, voor de mensen en voor de planeet. Name: CFES USA
Description:
WE BUY ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT

Surplus IT Liquidation  |  Asset Management  |  Data Destruction

WHAT WE DO

CFES provides IT Asset Disposition for high volumes of IT equipment and electronic scrap from schools and businesses. Clients receive true fair market value for their assets and peace of mind knowing their IT equipment has been properly retired in accordance with leading environmental and data security standards.

Upon request CFES issues their clients a Certificate of Destruction / Recycling, certifying the reclamation, destruction and recycling employed by their properly licensed facilities is in accordance with applicable federal regulation 40 CFR.

SERVICES

Computer/IT Liquidation

We offer a full range of IT disposal services with a focus on dedicated customer service, data security, and competitive pricing.

Secure Data Destruction

Complete data sanitization of all electronic media containing sensitive information to prevent intellectual property and personal information from leaking.

Environmentally Responsible

Zero landfill / zero export of electronic waste. All materials broken down and processed for the recovery of commodity grade metals and non-metals in compliance with all state and federal laws and regulations.

Bulk Loads / B2B Platform

If you have an inventory list available call a CFES salesperson for a consultation at 781.784.0000. Freight shipments on bulk loads over 500 LBS are setup within 1-2 business days.

Local Pickup

We can provide safe, reliable waste collection services for any customers in the New England and Tri-State areas.

Name: SecondLife Ltd
Description:
SecondLife Ltd is a UK-based IT asset lifecycle management company specialising in the recovery, refurbishment, resale, and recycling of computer equipment. We help businesses maximise the value and sustainability of their technology by extending the life of IT assets and ensuring environmentally responsible end-of-life management.

Our services cover the full asset lifecycle; including remote or onsite IT audits, data sanitisation, repairs, valuations, resale programs, rentals, and certified recycling. We provide complete traceability and compliance with environmental and data security regulations, supporting clients in meeting corporate sustainability and GDPR obligations.

Through our circular economy model, SecondLife Ltd reduces e-waste, supports carbon reduction goals, and helps organisations turn redundant IT assets into revenue. We operate with a commitment to quality, transparency, and continuous improvement, currently holding ISO 9001 (Quality Management) and ISO 14001 (Environmental Management) certification.

Our goal is simple: to give technology a second life—benefiting our clients, our community, and the planet.

Name: GoBytes
Description:
GoBytes.nl is onderdeel van Yousfi IT & Trading. Door middel van de webshop GoBytes bedient de onderneming Yousfi IT & Trading de consumentenmarkt met een breed assortiment van gebruikte, refurbished en nieuwe laptops, desktops, Smartphones, Tablets, Ram geheugen, Solide State Drives (SSD), Harddisks (HDD), tablets en bijhorende accessoires. Dit aanbod bestaat uitsluitend uit gerenommeerde merken van onder andere Lenovo, HP, Dell, Samsung en Apple.

De refurbished en gebruikte hardware zijn afkomstig uit zakelijk gebruik (bedrijfsleven) en uit faillissementen uit binnen- en buitenland. Na ontvangst van de hardware worden deze grondig nagekeken op werking en voorzien van een schone legale installatie van bijhorende besturingssysteem. Daarnaast worden alle laptops en desktops stofvrij gemaakt en voorzien van de bijhorende drivers.

De gebruikte hardware uit het bedrijfsleven wordt vaak na de leaseperiode of afschrijvingstermijn vervangen door nieuwe hardware. Yousfi IT & Trading zet zich in om zoveel mogelijk van de hardware uit het bedrijfsleven opnieuw in te zetten op een zo milieuvriendelijke wijze, waardoor verspilling en milieuverontreiniging wordt gereduceerd. Duurzaamheid staat bij ons dan ook hoog in het vaandel! Als u bij Yousfi IT & trading koopt, dan koopt u niet alleen een kwalitatief hoogwaardige laptop, desktop, Smartphone, Tablet, Ram geheugen, Solide State Drive (SSD), Harddisk (HDD) of tablet maar draagt u ook uw steentje bij aan het milieu!

Yousfi IT & Trading is met haar team dagelijks bezig met het verwerven van kwalitatief hoogwaardige hardware tegen de meest gunstige prijs. Wij zijn overtuigd van de kwaliteit van onze aangeboden hardware en bieden daarom drie maanden garantie op de hardware (m.u.v. de accu).

Name: Admin Informatique
Description:
Et si votre fournisseur IT devenait enfin votre allié de confiance ? 

 Parlons sans filtre.
Acheter un ordinateur, une baie ou un écran ? Facile.
Trouver un partenaire qui vous comprend, devine vos besoins avant même que vous les formuliez,
et reste là après la livraison, dans les moments critiques ?
 C’est une autre histoire.
Chez Admin Informatique, on a bâti notre ADN sur cette réalité :
 Ce n’est pas la quantité qui compte,
 C’est la qualité du lien, la pertinence de la solution,
et surtout… la hauteur de la vision.

 Transformation Digitale : avez-vous embarqué le bon copilote ?
Chez nous, la tech n’est pas un produit.
 C’est un langage. Un pont entre vos objectifs et vos outils.
 Oui, nous sommes distributeur et retailer…
Mais en vrai ? Nous sommes votre division tech externe, proactive, humaine, ultra-connectée.

 Notre mission ? Dépasser le simple rôle de fournisseur.
 Conseil stratégique personnalisé
 Intégration sur-mesure, testée, validée
 Déploiement fluide, sans friction
 Support local, humain, réactif… et allergique aux galères.

 À qui parlons-nous ?
À ceux qui construisent l’avenir, dans toutes ses formes :
 Le revendeur agile, qui veut garder une longueur d’avance
 L’entreprise exigeante, qui a besoin d’infrastructure à la hauteur de ses ambitions
 L’institution responsable, qui cherche transparence et fiabilité
 Le créatif ou gamer pointu, qui refuse les compromis sur la performance
 Et aussi le grand public, les surfeurs du net, les consommateurs du quotidien, et les enfants, que l’on accompagne avec attention dans un monde numérique en constante évolution.

HAKKIMIZDA

2009  yılında NACAR BİLİŞİM olarak  hizmet vermeye başlayan firmamız, kurulduğu günden itibaren bilişim sektöründeki en yeni teknolojileri takip ederek, sektörümüzün ileriye taşınmasına destek olmak amacıyla internet kafelere ve son kullanıcılara  Oyun Bilgisayarı, Ofis Bilgisayarı ve Bilgisayar parçaları üzerine satış yaparak sektörde adından bahsettirmeye başlamış daha sonralarda ise müşteri sayılarını istikrarlı bir şekilde artıran firmamız; süregelen profesyonellik, dürüstlük ve pazarı geliştirme konularında istikrarlı olarak büyüyerek bilişim sektöründe saygın bir yer edinmeye başlamıştır. Büyüme üzerine politikasından hiçbir zaman vazgeçmeyen firmamız 2017 yılında son kullanıcılara satış yapmak üzere NCRGAME markasını oluşturmuş olup sonrasında kendi bünyesinde Teknik Servis Hizmetini de devreye almış ve kalite politikasını bir üst seviyeye ulaştırmayı başarmıştır.
Sektöründeki gelişmeleri ve pazardaki yenilikleri yakından takip eden firmamız, güçlü idari ve mali yapısıyla zamanla bilişim sektöründe önde gelen firmalardan biri haline gelmiştir. Türkiye geneline satış yapan firmamız yenilikçi, vizyoner, kalite politikasıyla her geçen gün müşteri sayısını artırmayı başarmıştır.
Ülkemizde; gerek satış hacmi, gerekse de müşteri beklenti ve ihtiyaçlarını en üst düzeyde karşılamaya gayret eden firmamız, geçmişte olduğu gibi müşteri ihtiyaçlarını en iyi şekilde çözümleyerek bundan sonra da hizmetlerine kaldığı yerden devam edecektir.

Name: QuatraCore
Description:
Welcome to Quatra Core – Your Premier IT Solutions Provider
In a rapidly advancing technological landscape, where continuous innovation frequently makes current hardware outdated, there is an increasing demand for bridging the divide between state-of-the-art IT capabilities and environmental conscientiousness. This is where QuatraCore, an innovative IT hardware reselling company specializing in End-of-Life (EOL) components, steps in. Pledging to prioritize reliability, sustainability, and cost-effectiveness, QuatraCore is leading the charge in revolutionizing how businesses address the management of their IT hardware lifecycle.

Established with a vision to transform the IT industry, QuatraCore set out to tackle the challenges associated with End-of-Life hardware. End-of-Life parts encompass IT components and equipment that have reached the end of their official product lifecycle, often resulting in discontinuation by the original manufacturer. This presents a significant challenge for businesses and data centers relying on these components in their infrastructure.
The inception of QuatraCore was rooted in a comprehensive understanding of this predicament. Acknowledging that End-of-Life parts can retain high functionality and value, the company aimed to offer organizations access to quality, dependable, and sustainable alternatives to newly manufactured components. In doing so, QuatraCore not only sought to prolong the life of IT hardware but also aimed to contribute positively to the environment by minimizing electronic waste.

Stærke computere til din virksomhed
Står du og mangler højkvalitets computere til alle de ansatte i din virksomhed? Så er du kommet til det helt rette sted. Hos GameCastle.dk kan vi nemlig hjælpe dig med at finde de helt rette computere, så du får nogle, der matcher dine ansattes arbejdsopgaver. Med det sagt, så hjælper vi her hos GameCastle adskillige kunder, og du behøver derfor ikke at have din egen virksomhed. Måske du i stedet mangler nogle stærke gamer computere til din netcafé, så dine brugere altid er tilfredse? Måske du blot har dit eget lille hjemmekontor, der trænger til en opgradering? Uanset, hvad din situation er samt, hvorfor du mangler én eller flere computere, så hjælper vi dig med at finde frem til den bedste løsning.

Vi forhandler både brugte og nye computere samtidig med, at vi forhandler computere til flere forskellige formål. Vi sammensætter ligeledes gamer computere af nye såvel som brugte dele alt efter, hvilke ønsker og krav du har til din nye computer. Skal du dog bruge computeren til arbejde, er det essentielt at lave en løsning ud fra de programmer, computeren skal anvendes til. Vi skræddersyer desuden altid vores løsninger til din virksomhed, så du får mest for pengene dine penge.

Hvad kan vi tilbyde?
Jo, kort sagt kan vi tilbyde præcis den løsning, som du har behov for – og vi tilbyder naturligvis en komplet løsning til din virksomhed. Vi er desuden de helt rette til at vejlede dig i valget af computere til tungt 
Velkommen hos Gamecastle.dk.

Description:
GEODEAL : Experts en reprise, rachat et reconditionnement d’équipements informatiques et bureautiques

La gestion du remplacement et du recyclage d'un parc de matériels IT est souvent complexe, chronophage et coûteuse. Les défis techniques, réglementaires et logistiques se heurtent à la volonté des entreprises de concilier économie et respect de l'environnement. Depuis 2003, GEODEAL a fait de cette mission son cœur de métier : le renouvellement durable de l'IT.

Notre Mission
Assurer un renouvellement durable des équipements IT, en offrant des solutions efficaces et respectueuses de l’environnement.

Pourquoi choisir GEODEAL ?
-Réactivité : Réactivité exemplaire avec accompagnement et conseils personnalisés.
-Expertise : Plus de 20 ans d'expérience, offrant les meilleurs conseils et services.
-Professionnalisme : Équipes compétentes respectant strictement les réglementations en vigueur.

Nos Services
GEODEAL offre une gamme complète de services :

-Reprise et rachat de matériels
-Reconditionnement d’équipements informatiques
-Solutions de recyclage conformes aux normes environnementales

Notre Engagement RSE
GEODEAL est profondément engagé dans une démarche de Responsabilité Sociétale des Entreprises (RSE). Nous intégrons des pratiques durables dans toutes nos activités :

Réduction de l'empreinte carbone : Prolonge la vie des équipements IT pour réduire les déchets électroniques.
Économie circulaire : Favorise la réutilisation et le reconditionnement des matériels.
Engagement social : Soutient des initiatives locales et collabore avec des partenaires partageant nos valeurs éthiques et sociales.
Engagez-vous pour un avenir durable avec GEODEAL

Choisir GEODEAL, c’est opter pour une gestion responsable de vos équipements informatiques, alliant performance économique et engagement environnemental.

Description:

We supply both new and refurbished I.T. hardware — laptops, desktops, tablets, and peripherals — to schools, businesses, and public-sector customers across the UK. Every device is fully tested, warrantied, and supported by our friendly Somerset-based team.

When it’s time to refresh your tech, our in-house I.T. Asset Disposal (ITAD) service securely collects, data-wipes, and refurbishes old equipment — keeping devices in use and reducing e-waste.

By combining hardware supply with ethical disposal, we create a circular I.T. ecosystem where nothing goes to waste and sustainability doesn’t mean compromise.

With over 25 years in the industry (originally known for our ink and toner expertise), we’re one of the UK’s trusted partners for affordable, sustainable I.T. solutions.

Name: FRENEXPORT Spa
Description:
Frenexport is a flexible and dynamic company with its core business consisting in manufacturing, distribution and marketing of brands to Musical instruments Retail shops and AVL Professionals with focus on providing his customers a wide range of products and services as a "single source" or "one stop provider". Frenexport address exclusively Business to Business

FRENEXPORT  was formed in 1976 in Recanati (Central Italy), the core of the music tradition of the Marche region by Bruno Frenquelli, an experienced musical product exporter. Facing economic pressures in the music products industry in the 1980’s, the company successfully began importing musical products and began distribution in the domestic Italian market.

With the additions of Romano (older son of Bruno) to the organization at the end of the 90’ and later of his brother Daniele (younger son), Frenexport stands poised in creating new opportunities and continued prosperity for the future.

In order to complete the process of transforming Frenexport in a corporate business, the legal status changed in January 2011 into Public Limited Company. The executive board consists of Bruno Frenquelli ( President), Romano Frenquelli (Vice President), Daniele Frenquelli.

Today, Frenexport provides products and services to customers across Europe and Worldwide. 

Frenexport is also owner of SOUNDSATION and HELVIA brands. Products are being designed,manufactured and distribuited by Frenexport itself.

Name: Alternative ITAD
Description:
Fondée en 1999 avec une vision claire du re-emploi des équipements informatiques, Alternative ITAD a su évoluer tout en restant fidèle à ses valeurs fondamentales pour assurer une gestion durable des actifs numériques. Nous favorisons l'économie circulaire et la réduction de CO2.

 Un héritage de confiance et d’innovation
Alternative ITAD a commencé son aventure à une époque où le concept de reconditionnement et de réutilisation des équipements informatiques était émergent. Grâce à une expertise pointue et une connaissance approfondie du marché, l’entreprise a rapidement gagné la confiance de ses clients en offrant des solutions fiables et économiques.

 Un engagement durable
L’entreprise ne se contente pas de prolonger la vie des équipements informatiques, elle s’engage également à réduire l’empreinte écologique de ses activités. Alternative ITAD assure la promotion de l’économie circulaire, en offrant des solutions qui allient performance technologique et responsabilité sociétale.

 Conformité et protection des données au cœur de nos préoccupations
Alternative ITAD respecte rigoureusement les réglementations en vigueur avec des solutions d’effacement labellisées par l’ANSSI. Chaque processus de reconditionnement et de gestion des actifs informatiques est conçu pour assurer une sécurité maximale.

Des services complets et personnalisés
Alternative ITAD propose une gamme complète de services, allant de la reprise d’actifs informatiques à la revente d’équipements reconditionnés. Chaque service est conçu pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de nos clients, tout en garantissant une gestion efficace et durable des actifs informatiques.

 Une vision pour l’avenir
Avec une histoire riche et une vision tournée vers l’avenir, Alternative ITAD continue d’innover et de s’adapter aux évolutions du marché. En choisissant Alternative ITAD, vous optez pour une entreprise qui combine tradition et modernité, avec la volonté de respecter les neuf limites planétaires.

ÇÖZÜM A.Ş. bugün geldiği noktada; kurum kültürü, marka kimliği, sahip olduğu değerleri, çalışma prensipleri, hizmet kalitesi ve güvenilirliği ile sektörün önemli oyuncularından birisidir. 3 şubesi, 70 ‘den fazla çalışanı, 2500’ü aşkın bayi ağı, TSE, ISO 9001:2015 kalite belgesi ile yurt çapında faaliyetlerini yürütmektedir.

The tested products will be displayed in usedstore and unusable components will be sent to e-waste, reducing landfill and saving "Mother Earth".
Depending on the type and model, as well as where you purchase, buying a refurbished laptop or second-hand laptop can save you lots of money. The refurbished laptops would be at least Two years to Five years old depending upon the policies of the corporate firm dispensing them. Not only you save on money, but also you will get a business series laptop that is 65% cheaper than the new one.

If you are planning to buy or for rent Refurbished laptops and Desktops or secondhand laptops to save your money? You are at the right place. UsedStore recommends only Refurbished laptops and Desktops. You may wonder why Refurbished only, why not Second Hand laptops or used Laptops and Desktops. Many people mistakenly believe that when they hear the term “refurbished,” it simply implies that a refurbished laptop is the same as a used laptop or second hand laptop. A refurbished laptop is just a computer that has been returned for whatever reason, tested, cleaned, upgraded, and, if required fixed before being resold with warranty.

Name: BROKSTER
Description:
Brokster est un courtier informatique indépendant qui simplifie la fin de vie de vos équipements IT. Nous organisons la récupération sécurisée de vos parcs – serveurs, PC portables, réseaux, imprimantes – en moins de 72 h partout en France, grâce à notre réseau logistique certifié.

Une fois collectés, vos matériels suivent un processus industriel de revalorisation : audit technique détaillé, effacement de données conforme NIST 800-88 / ISO 27001, reconditionnement premium ou recyclage responsable via partenaires R2v3. Les équipements remis sur le marché bénéficient d’une traçabilité complète ; ceux qui ne peuvent être reconditionnés sont démantelés selon les normes environnementales les plus strictes.

Notre mission : transformer l’obsolescence en valeur durable. Vous libérez de l’espace, réduisez votre empreinte carbone et financez vos prochains projets IT sans mobiliser vos équipes. Obtenez votre estimation neutre et gratuite sous 24 h et découvrez comment Brokster injecte de la circularité, de la conformité et de la rapidité dans chaque transition technologique.

Name: Store24.lt
Description:
Store24.lt internetinę parduotuvę valdo MB “Parduotuvė internete”. Specializuojamės prekyboje buitine technika, nešiojama technika. O jei trumpiau, tai tokia elektronika, kuri supa mus kiekvieną dieną ir aišku lengvina gyvenimą. Mes dedikuojam savo veiklą klientų poreikių tenkinimui, tiekdami aukštos kokybės produkciją ir profesionalias paslaugas. Mūsų tikslas yra padėti klientams pasiekti savo norimus rezultatus, pasirinkti tinkamiausią įrangą bei užtikrinti patikimą ir efektyvų jos naudojimą. Esame sudarę tiekimo sutartis su didžiausiais IT ir buitinės įrangos distributoriais Europos Sąjungoje. Siūloma produkcija prekiaujame internetinėje parduotuvėje https://store24.lt, taip pat tiekiame prekes kitoms Baltijos šalyse veikiančioms interneto parduotuvėms, privačioms bei viešojo sektoriaus įmonėms.

Savo asortimente turime plataus spektro prekių, pradedant nuo buitinės technikos - televizorių, šaldytuvų, orkaičių, ir baigiant nešiojamais, planšetiniais kompiuteriais ir periferine IT įranga. Taip pat mes siūlome įvairius IT įrangos produktus, tokius kaip monitoriai, spausdintuvai, maršrutizatoriai, tinklo įrangos priemonės, ausinės, klaviatūros, pelės ir kt.

Mūsų komandos specialistai turi ne vienerių metų patirtį elektroninėje prekyboje. Matome, kad dauguma internetinių parduotuvių pateikia per mažai informacijos apie prekes, todėl siekiame būti kitokie, padėti pasirinkti tinkamiausią įrangą pagal klientų poreikius ir lūkesčius. Stengiamės užtikrinti, kad mūsų klientai gautų aiškią informaciją apie produktus. Taip pat mes nuolat stebime rinkos naujoves ir siekiame pasiūlyti naujausius ir pažangiausius technologinius sprendimus.

Mūsų įmonės vertybės apima profesionalumą, pasitikėjimą, kokybę ir nuolatinį tobulėjimą. Mes siekiame užmegzti ilgalaikius santykius su savo klientais, kuriuos matome kaip partnerius ir bendradarbius mūsų sėkmingai veiklai. Tikime, kad su Jūsų pagalba dar labiau tobulėsime, tad jei turite pastebėjimų, drąsiai rašykite mums info@store24.lt.
